sentence: It was the first time it had been just the two of us since England.

Since England, this was the first moment it had been just us two.

The Christmas parcel from Auntie Lou has finally arrived!

Back at the coach, Dad saw the stove sitting idle and decided he'd start breakfast himself, telling me to go back to bed and take it easy until the food was ready.

Had I been to Buckingham Palace to take tea with the king? That was what Elizabeth asked.

Mother says it is all very well to laugh at Canadian place names, but we should remember we come from a country with places called things like "Wigglesworth."
Laughing at Canadian place names is fine, Mother says, but let's not forget that back home we have towns with names like "Wigglesworth."

I dreamed I was riding a horse, only the horse was galloping across the ocean.
In my dream I rode a horse — across the ocean, of all places.

We learned that luggage is baggage here, a three-strand barbed wire fence costs $150 per mile, and there is no malaria whatsoever in Canada.

Canadian trains are not at all the same as what I know.
